exemplar.title: What challenges are raised by the dissemination and/or communication of knowledge?

detailedExemplarData.title: What challenges are raised by the dissemination and/or communication of knowledge?

strengths: Clearly presents three distinct objects linked to the selected IA prompt.
Demonstrates an awareness of challenges in disseminating knowledge for each object.
Cultural explanation of the Wayuu bagâs crochet technique and symbolism is well-researched.
weaknesses: Real-world contexts are only partially developed (generic images, lack of provenance details).
Analysis remains surface-level, with inconsistent use of key TOK terminology and unsupported assertions.
Object justifications are repetitive, focusing narrowly on power dynamics with limited evidential support.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exhibition satisfies the descriptors of the 3â4 band: it identifies three clear objects linked to prompt 10 and offers basic explanations of knowledge-dissemination challenges. However, the real-world contexts are vague (generic atlas, unreferenced edition of 1984, stock image of the Wayuu bag), and much of the analysis lacks depth, precision and consistent TOK vocabulary. While there is a sound cultural justification for the bag and some reference to colonial power in maps and Newspeak, the commentary drifts into broad socio-political assertions without sufficient evidence. These strengths and weaknesses align with a band-4 performance, justifying the examinerâs awarded score of 4.

annotations.comment: The student uses a generic atlas image rather than a specific example of their personal copy, weakening the real-world context. Consider including a photo or detailed description of the exact atlas used.
The context for Object 1 is vague: stating âmiddle school atlasâ lacks edition, publication date or provenance. Add these details to clarify the specific real-world context.
Clarify terminology by defining âMercator projectionâ in TOK terms and cite a source for the distortion claim to strengthen the link to knowledge communication challenges.
The final sentence of this analysis is cut off (âdetailing strategic geographical and politicalâ¦â), which interrupts clarity. Complete the thought for a cohesive argument.
Footnotes and URLs are inconsistently formatted. Adopt a clear, consistent citation style (APA, MLA or Chicago) to enhance credibility.
The commentary on how hegemonic narratives influence knowledge is broad and repeats earlier points. Focus on object-specific implications to avoid generalization.
The image of 1984 is sourced generically from Google, not the studentâs actual copy. Including a photo of the specific edition would strengthen personal context.
The reference to colonial maps<sup>1</sup> appears mid-paragraph without integration. Reposition or integrate the footnote more seamlessly to support the claim.
Footnote formatting is broken in the Moscow Times reference (<sup>&</sup>). Correct HTML or citation code to display properly.
The concluding sentence on page 4 reiterates earlier points about power and language but adds little new insight. Deepen discussion by exploring another angle.
The discussion of the novel would benefit from explicit TOK terms such as âways of knowingâ or âknowledge frameworksâ to anchor it in the course vocabulary.
The Wayuu bag image is another stock photo from Google, not your own artifact. Including a personal photo would enhance authenticity.
The cultural explanation of the crochet technique and color symbolism is clear and well-researched, providing strong justification for the objectâs inclusion.
The context for the Wayuu bag lacks details on how and when you acquired it. Add this personal provenance to anchor real-world context.
Bibliography entries contain stray math artifacts (e.g., â\logâ, â\mathbfâ). Clean formatting and remove LaTeX code from references.
The bibliography entries vary in style and ordering. Adopt a recognized citation format for consistency and clarity.
The final commentary before the bibliography reads like an addendum rather than a conclusion. Add a concluding paragraph summarizing how the three objects together address the prompt.
The object justifications focus heavily on power dynamics. Consider exploring other challengesâsuch as language barriers or technologyâto diversify your analysis.
Key TOK terms such as âperspective,â âbias,â and âpowerâ are used inconsistently. Define these terms explicitly and apply them systematically.
The subheading âCommentary Object 1â could reinforce the link to the IA prompt by adding ââ Prompt 10â to each heading for clarity.
Stating âMy brother gave me the book 1984 this yearâ lacks edition or publication details. Specify which edition and year to ground the context.
The analysis of Newspeak is descriptive but drifts from the prompt. Tie each point explicitly back to âchallenges in dissemination of knowledgeâ using TOK terminology.
Expand analysis by discussing how indigenous communities use oral WOKs to disseminate their history, adding depth beyond hegemonic exclusion.
Could you provide specific data or a map figure to substantiate the claim about Mercator distortion reinforcing power hierarchies?
Can you cite a specific study or example to support the statement about hegemonic narratives influencing map interpretation?

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content:
The exhibition presents
three objects, but the
real-world contexts of
these objects are not
stated, or the images
presented may be
highly generic images of
types of object rather
than of specific
real-world objects. Links
between the objects

these are minimal,

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
